ddls:
CREATE TABLE "sales_data" (
  "sales_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sales record */,
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the region where the sales were made */,
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product category of the sales */,
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the month of the sales */,
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the year of the sales */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount for the month and region */,
  "salesperson_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the salesperson responsible for the sale */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the customer who made the purchase */,
  "order_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the order */,
  "units_sold" INTEGER /* Number of units sold */,
  "discount_amount" REAL /* Discount amount applied to the sale */,
  "tax_amount" REAL /* Tax amount applied to the sale */,
  "net_sales_amount" REAL /* Net sales amount after discounts and taxes */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the sales record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sales_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_year_id FOREIGN KEY ("year_id") REFERENCES years ("year_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_product_category_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_category_id") REFERENCES product_categories ("product_category_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_month_id FOREIGN KEY ("month_id") REFERENCES months ("month_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_data_region_id FOREIGN KEY ("region_id") REFERENCES regions ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "regions" (
  "region_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each region */,
  "region_name" TEXT /* Name of the region */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the region */,
  "region_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the region */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the region is located */,
  "timezone" TEXT /* Timezone of the region */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the region record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("region_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_categories" (
  "product_category_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product category */,
  "product_category_name" TEXT /* Name of the product category */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the product category */,
  "category_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the product category */,
  "parent_category_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the parent product category (for hierarchical categories) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product category record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the product category record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_category_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "months" (
  "month_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each month */,
  "month_name" TEXT /* Name of the month (e.g., JAN, FEB, MAR, etc.) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the month record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the month record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("month_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "years" (
  "year_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each year */,
  "year_name" INTEGER /* Year */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the year record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("year_id")
)
